question.text: According to the BIS Triennial Central Bank Survey 2022, what is the approximate average daily turnover of OTC foreign exchange markets globally?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per the BIS Triennial Central Bank Survey 2022, the average daily turnover of OTC foreign exchange is approximately USD 7.5 trillion. FX swaps are the largest component at USD 3,810 billion. **The Trap:** USD 5 trillion was approximately the figure from the 2016 survey — the market has grown significantly since then. **Cross-Exam Context:** Global FX market size is tested in Series I and XII. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** FX swaps dominate (USD 3.81 trillion), followed by spot (USD 2.1 trillion) and outright forwards (USD 1.16 trillion). Exchange-traded derivatives are only USD 154 billion.
